title: Poster: Work to Earn
subtitleProgress: Question {{current}} of {{total}}: Choose posters that promote hard work!

stages.question: Which poster would best teach kids about earning money?
What poster would best show the value of hard work?

choices.text: Why Work When You Can Get Free Stuff? 🎁

stages.question: Which poster teaches the best work ethic?

choices.text: Small Jobs Lead to Big Dreams! ✨
Too Young to Work, Just Ask for Money! 💸

stages.question: What poster would best encourage saving earned money?

choices.text: Work Hard, Save Smart, Dream Big! 🏆
Money is for Spending, Not Saving! 🛒

stages.question: Which poster best explains why we work?

choices.text: Work is Just Something Grown-ups Do! 🤷
Why Work When You Can Win the Lottery? 🎰
